description_long: This is an elegant chandelier with six cylindrical fabric lampshades arranged in a circular pattern around a central metal hub. Each lampshade is supported by a gracefully curved metal arm, all converging at the base and extending outward symmetrically. The chandelier is suspended from the ceiling by a sturdy chain and a round ceiling mount, both made of metal. The overall design is modern yet classic, with clean lines and a balanced, symmetrical form. The lampshades are likely made of a light-colored fabric, providing a soft diffusion of light. The metal components have a smooth, possibly matte or semi-gloss finish, contributing to the fixture's refined appearance.
description: A six-shade chandelier with cylindrical fabric lampshades and curved metal arms, suspended by a chain from a round ceiling mount. The design is modern and symmetrical, with a soft, elegant look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six lampshades evenly spaced in a circular arrangement, with the chain and ceiling mount clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the chandelier, with three lampshades more prominent and the curved arms visible from the side.
description_view_2: Similar to the front view, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the lampshades and the central hub.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the three front lampshades and the curvature of the supporting arms.
